# Auto-generated rule: session-registry-fresh-claim-files-must-be-age-gated

Malformed semantic-id claim files in the session registry can be legitimate in-flight registration state. Zombie sweeps must preserve fresh malformed files and only remove aged ones by filesystem mtime.

## Evidence
Wave 4 reproduced a full-suite race where sweepZombies removed fresh malformed claim files before registerSelf could overwrite them; tests now cover fresh preservation and old malformed removal.
